div.div:
judge (type) → cases → rationale
cost_budget (builtin)
→ [c03] over max_cost_usd
ac_present (check)
→ [c01,c07] no accept. criteria
faithful (llm)
→ [c07] output drifts from spec
human_review
→ [c07] user flagged tone

div.div:
hypothesis: Step 4 says
"optionally add accept. criteria"
evidence: transcript skipped Step 4
- optionally add acceptance criteria
+ add acceptance criteria for each
+ story so reviewers verify scope

div.div:
NEVER edits (harness = ground truth):
builtin judges (agent_eval/judges/)
inline check / llm prompt judges
eval.yaml config + arguments
test cases / datasets
instead → suggest changes to user
builtin too strict → bump arguments:
